name: Bisquick Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fillings of your choice (example: broccoli, mushrooms)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 10-inch pie plate or an 8-inch square dish.
3. Sprinkle fillings, onions, and cheese in the prepared dish.
4. Beat remaining ingredients together until smooth and pour into the dish.
5. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted halfway between the edge and center comes out clean.
6. Allow to stand for 5 minutes before serving.
